title: User, Agent, and Tool Authority, Least Agency, Dry Runs, and Revocation · Runtime Lens: Dry Run Preview
summary: The model inherits a service account, treats user intent as permission, uses write tools for read tasks, and cannot distinguish allowed, approval-required, or denied actions. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dry run preview increment in least-agency authorization decision engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit the…
objectives: Generate deterministic application-owned previews and diffs before effects without trusting model-written summaries of the action.
Classify pure reads, sensitive reads, reversible writes, irreversible writes, external communication, financial, identity, and security effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-dry-run-preview — Generate deterministic application-owned previews and diffs before effects without trusting model-written summaries of the action.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-authorization-policy-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-tool-authorization-policy-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_tool_authorization_policy_2(requested_actions: int = 24, authorized_actions: int = 10, denied_actions: int = 8, approval_actions: int = 6, privilege_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or authorized_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "authorization-count"
    if authorized_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, authorized_actions, "authorization-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 1:
        return False, approval_actions, "approval-boundary"
    if privilege_leaks > 0:
        return False, privilege_leaks, "privilege-leak"
    assert authorized_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and privilege_leaks == 0
    return True, authorized_actions, "least-agency-policy"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-dry-run-preview-178r4q
# Competency: agentpy-dry-run-preview.
# Case 2116: an accessible public-service intake assistant.
# Operating constraint: loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_dry_run_preview_178r4q(requested_actions: int = 24, authorized_actions: int = 10, denied_actions: int = 8, approval_actions: int = 6, privilege_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_178r4q = "178r4q-q4r871-2116"
    assert evidence_variant_178r4q
    evidence_axes_178r4q = (
        "authority178r4q",
        "interaction2116",
        "toolq4r871",
        "state178r4q2116",
        "evaluation2116178r4q",
        "recoveryq4r8712116",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_178r4q)) == 6
    if requested_actions < 1 or authorized_actions < 0 or denied_actions < 0:
        return False, requested_actions, "authorization-count"
    if authorized_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions != requested_actions:
        return False, authorized_actions, "authorization-reconciliation"
    if approval_actions < 1:
        return False, approval_actions, "approval-boundary"
    if privilege_leaks > 0:
        return False, privilege_leaks, "privilege-leak"
    assert authorized_actions + denied_actions + approval_actions == requested_actions and privilege_leaks == 0
    return True, authorized_actions, "least-agency-policy"
